meaning: vi.视线移向,注视vt.使固定,注视,凝视,集中(眼)力
examples: She offers closing advice: "Don't fixate on things you can't do, but on things you can."
In addition, we have a tendency to 'play with problem' or fixate on something negative.
The eye tracker records these movements and the location of the foveal vision when the eyes fixate.
That is not something to fixate on but it is a benchmark worth occasional reference.
Financial headlines have a tendency to fixate on one shiny object after another.
